name: finance managers at small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For finance managers at small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month, overspending causes cash flow gaps. We automatically audit subscription expenses instead of manual tracking of subscriptions and expenses.
target_audience: finance managers at small marketing agencies processing 5–15 invoices/month
problem_solved: Overspending on recurring subscription expenses due to lack of visibility and anomaly detection.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Overspending on recurring subscription expenses due to lack of visibility and anomaly detection.
